flashcards.definition: An electron in the outermost energy level; determines an element's reactivity.
Atoms tend to gain, lose, or share electrons to have 8 valence electrons.
Increases down a group (easier to lose electrons).
Increases up a group and to the right (easier to gain electrons).
Group 17 elements; very reactive nonmetals with 7 valence electrons (F, Cl, Br, I).
